mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM emp_employee WHERE status IN (1, 2)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_dept WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance_checkin WHERE check_date = #{today} AND status IN (2, 3)

SELECT ( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_application WHERE status = 'PENDING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM overtime_application WHERE status = 'PENDING') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expense_report WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'MANAGER_APPROVED')) )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM leave_application WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM overtime_application WHERE create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < #{endDate}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_notice n WHERE n.status = 1 AND n.id NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT notice_id FROM sys_notice_read)

SELECT d.id AS departmentId, d.dept_name AS departmentName, COALESCE(COUNT(e.id), 0) AS employeeCount FROM sys_dept d LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON e.dept_id = d.id AND e.status IN (1, 2) WHERE d.status = 1 GROUP BY d.id, d.dept_name, d.sort ORDER BY d.sort ASC
SELECT leave_type AS leaveType, COUNT(*) AS count FROM leave_application GROUP BY leave_type ORDER BY leave_type

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS date, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS amount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expense_report WHERE status IN ('COMPLETED', 'FINANCE_APPROVED') AND create_time >= #{startDate} AND create_time < #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS abnormalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS normalCount, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (2, 3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) END AS abnormalRate FROM attendance_checkin WHERE check_date >= #{startDate} AND check_date < #{endDate}

SELECT e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS name, CASE e.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' ELSE '女' END AS gender, d.dept_name AS deptName, e.position AS position, e.entry_date AS entryDate, CASE e.status WHEN 1 THEN '在职' WHEN 2 THEN '试用期' WHEN 3 THEN '离职' ELSE '未知' END AS status, e.phone AS phone, e.email AS email FROM emp_employee e LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id ORDER BY e.id

SELECT e.name AS empName, d.dept_name AS deptName, ac.check_date AS checkDate, ac.check_in_time AS checkInTime, ac.check_out_time AS checkOutTime, CASE ac.status WHEN 1 THEN '正常' WHEN 2 THEN '迟到' WHEN 3 THEN '缺卡' WHEN 4 THEN '请假' ELSE '未知' END AS status FROM attendance_checkin ac LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON ac.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE ac.check_date >= #{startDate} AND ac.check_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY ac.check_date DESC, e.name

SELECT la.leave_no AS leaveNo, e.name AS empName, d.dept_name AS deptName, CASE la.leave_type WHEN 1 THEN '病假' WHEN 2 THEN '事假' WHEN 3 THEN '年假' WHEN 4 THEN '调休' WHEN 5 THEN '婚假' WHEN 6 THEN '产假' WHEN 7 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END AS leaveType, la.start_date AS startDate, la.end_date AS endDate, la.days AS days, la.reason AS reason, CASE la.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'MANAGER_APPROVED' THEN '经理已审批' WHEN 'FINANCE_APPROVED' THEN '财务已审批' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已完成' ELSE la.status END AS status, la.create_time AS createTime FROM leave_application la LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON la.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE la.create_time >= #{startDate} AND la.create_time < #{endDate} ORDER BY la.create_time DESC

SELECT oa.overtime_no AS overtimeNo, e.name AS empName, d.dept_name AS deptName, CASE oa.overtime_type WHEN 1 THEN '工作日加班' WHEN 2 THEN '周末加班' WHEN 3 THEN '节假日加班' ELSE '未知' END AS overtimeType, oa.start_time AS startTime, oa.end_time AS endTime, oa.hours AS hours, oa.reason AS reason, CASE oa.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'MANAGER_APPROVED' THEN '经理已审批' WHEN 'FINANCE_APPROVED' THEN '财务已审批' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已完成' ELSE oa.status END AS status, oa.create_time AS createTime FROM overtime_application oa LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON oa.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE oa.create_time >= #{startDate} AND oa.create_time < #{endDate} ORDER BY oa.create_time DESC

SELECT er.report_no AS reportNo, e.name AS empName, d.dept_name AS deptName, er.expense_type AS expenseType, er.total_amount AS totalAmount, er.description AS description, CASE er.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'MANAGER_APPROVED' THEN '经理已审批' WHEN 'FINANCE_APPROVED' THEN '财务已审批' WHEN 'REJECTED' THEN '已驳回' WHEN 'COMPLETED' THEN '已完成' ELSE er.status END AS status, er.create_time AS createTime FROM expense_report er LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON er.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE er.create_time >= #{startDate} AND er.create_time < #{endDate} ORDER BY er.create_time DESC

SELECT ar.business_type AS businessType, CASE ar.business_type WHEN 'LEAVE' THEN '请假' WHEN 'OVERTIME' THEN '加班' WHEN 'EXPENSE' THEN '报销' ELSE ar.business_type END AS businessTypeText, ar.business_id AS businessId, e.name AS approverName, CASE ar.approval_result WHEN 1 THEN '通过' WHEN 2 THEN '驳回' ELSE '未知' END AS approvalResult, ar.approval_opinion AS approvalOpinion, ar.approval_time AS approvalTime FROM approval_record ar LEFT JOIN emp_employee e ON ar.approver_id = e.id ORDER BY ar.approval_time DESC
